description: Cosmos Security Services & Investigations (Pvt) Ltd and another Vs. K. Priyantha Fernando J.
parties: Cosmos Security Services & Investigations (Pvt) Ltd and another Vs. The Commissioner General of Inland Revenue and others Cosmos Security Services & Investigations (Pvt) Ltd and another Vs. The Commissioner General of Inland Revenue and others View More
keywords: No evidence provided to prove decision was ultra vires, purported illegality of Certificate of Tax in Default, specifically designed multi-tiered tax appeal process, hierarchy of appeals, Magistrate Court is vested with the jurisdiction to recover tax but when a suitable application is made the District Court would have such authority.
legistation: Article 140 of the Constitution • Section 177 of the Inland Revenue Act No. 10 of 2006 • Sections 42(6) and 43 of the Value Added Tax Act No. 14 of 2002 • Section 8 of the Nation Building Tax Act No. 9 of 2009 • Sections 226 to 297 of the Civil Procedure Code • Extraordinary Gazette Notification No. 1380/17
